## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass: `python tests/test_mmd_validator.py`
- [ ] New example scores validated: `python tools/mmd_validator.py examples/<file>.mmd`
- [ ] Spec updated (`spec/musical-markdown-spec.md`) if syntax or validation behavior changed
- [ ] `MANIFEST.md` updated if new files were added
- [ ] README updated if the change affects usage or the roadmap table
